== Notes for [[Item:Q52580|Q52580]] ==

{geni:about_me} HIS DAUGHTER RENUKA WAS MARRIED TO JAMADAGNI. SHE WAS THE MOTHER OFPARASURAMA.
<p>http://www.gloriousindia.com/history/dynasties/ikshvaku/index.html</p>
<p>http://www.gloriousindia.com/history/dynasties/ikshvaku/prasenjit_i.html</p>

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
6707A5D5E26A31EFBBFC9A22EF79916B2BDD

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
